title: Libenburg
description: A clean gray-themed PvP texture pack that improves weapon, armor, GUI, and effects for competitive gameplay.
body:
This texture pack is designed specifically for PvP servers, focusing on a clean gray color palette that reduces visual noise and improves readability during combat.

All textures are optimized for clarity, consistency, and performance, making it easier to focus on fights without unnecessary distractions.

## 🔹 Changed Items & Equipment
- Diamond Sword  
- Netherite Sword  
- Diamond Armor  
- Netherite Armor  
- Iron Armor  
- Gold Armor  
- Diamond Tools  
- Netherite Tools  
- Elytra  
- Ender Pearl  
- Experience Bottle  
- Totem of Undying  

## 🔹 GUI Improvements
- Inventory  
- Hotbar  
- Buttons  

## 🔹 Visual Effects
- Shorter flame effects

## 🎯 Why use this pack?
- Neutral gray tones reduce eye strain  
- Cleaner visuals for PvP combat  
- Consistent style across items and GUI  
- Ideal for competitive and PvP-focused servers  

Perfect for players who want a minimalistic, professional-looking PvP experience.
